data.title: Michael Saylor Says MARA On The 'Bitcoin Standard' As Company Doubles Market Cap, Stock Price In Last 3 Months
data.description: MARA Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:MARA) more than doubled its market valuation over the last three months, powered by gains in the apex cryptocurrency and its gradual pivot toward the Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) “Standard."

data.title: Tesla's Cybertruck Is Not Coming To China Anytime Soon: Report
data.description: EV giant Tesla's China team has reportedly denied that the Cybertruck will be brought to China via official channels anytime soon, laying rumors otherwise to rest.

data.title: Honeywell, Salesforce And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Tuesday
Tesla Gives Cybertruck Production Line Workers 3 Days Off: Report
data.description: Tesla has reportedly informed its workers on the Cybertruck production line at its gigafactory in Texas to take three days off starting from Tuesday.

data.title: Apple Faces Lawsuit Over Alleged Snooping On Employees' iPhones And Other Devices
data.description: Apple is facing a legal challenge from one of its own, as an ad tech manager has accused the company of violating employee privacy rights through its policies.
